rules.rule_text: The abbreviation DM may be paired with its full spelling dermatomyositis to clarify the condition.

quotes: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.
...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position.

rules.rule_text: Approved MOA statements must describe how LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease by turning off specific inflammatory switches instead of suppressing the immune system generally.
